testcase.name: test_admin_login

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'admin' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf92e00562300>('role') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf92e00562300> = {}.get + where {} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf92e000f5f00>('user', {}) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf92e000f5f00> = {'message': 'Login successful', 'role': 'admin', 'success': True, 'username': 'admin'}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration24_gunny_g_issued.py:261: in test_admin_login assert data.get('user', {}).get('role') == 'admin' E AssertionError: assert None == 'admin' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf92e00562300>('role') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf92e00562300> = {}.get E + where {} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf92e000f5f00>('user', {}) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf92e000f5f00> = {'message': 'Login successful', 'role': 'admin', 'success': True, 'username': 'admin'}.get

testcase.name: test_staff_login

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'staff' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf92dfff61a00>('role') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf92dfff61a00> = {}.get + where {} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf92dfff61e00>('user', {}) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf92dfff61e00> = {'message': 'Login successful', 'role': 'staff', 'success': True, 'username': 'staff'}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration24_gunny_g_issued.py:273: in test_staff_login assert data.get('user', {}).get('role') == 'staff' E AssertionError: assert None == 'staff' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf92dfff61a00>('role') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf92dfff61a00> = {}.get E + where {} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf92dfff61e00>('user', {}) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf92dfff61e00> = {'message': 'Login successful', 'role': 'staff', 'success': True, 'username': 'staff'}.get
